name: Crockpot Chicken and Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chopped vegetables at the bottom of the pot.
2. Put the chicken on top of the vegetables.
3. Add the seasonings (salt, pepper, and dried basil) to the pot.
4. Pour 3 cups of water over the ingredients.
5. Set the crockpot to low heat and cook for 8-10 hours.
6. Carefully remove the chicken from the bones using tongs or a slotted spoon.
7. Add the uncooked noodles to the broth.
8. Turn the crockpot up to high heat and let the noodles cook for 45 minutes, until they are tender.
9. Remove the meat from the bones and mix it with the noodles.
10. This dish is a very thick chicken soup that tastes delicious thanks to the basil.
